text:

Author: woodsb02

Log:
  Add new port audio/forked-daapd, a DAAP (iTunes), MPD (Music
  Player Daemon) and RSP (Roku) media server.

  Submitted by:	takumiiinn@gmail.com, with extra work by pi
  Approved by:	adamw (mentor)
